title: AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM 88, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PAGE 163, PARAGRAPH "g," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3000 / 55 OG No. 35, 7311 (August 31, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2458, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND ITEM 88, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LAGUNA, PAGE 163, PARAGRAPH "g," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED SIXTEEN HUNDRED THIRTEEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item 88, for the Province of Laguna, page 163, paragraph "g," section two of Republic Act Numbered Sixteen hundred thirteen is amended to read as follows:

"88.

Memorial Public Library building, Lumban

P5,000.00â

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 21, 1959.
